name: aie-web
description: A web toolkit of nine focused skills for auditing and improving any website — SEO/AEO, a broad site health audit, load performance, pre-launch QA, a defensive security review, link checking, form wiring, a UX/usability review, and automated Playwright browser testing. Stack-agnostic: plain HTML, WordPress, React, Next.js, Vite, Astro, or a hosted builder.
